mapper.select: SELECT BL.BL_COLUMN_NAME as COLUMN_NAME, BD.BD_DATA, BD.BD_DATA BD_DATA_ORI, BD.BD_BL_KEYNO, BD.BD_BL_TYPE, BD.BD_KEYNO FROM b_board_column BL, B_BOARD_COLUMN_DATA BD WHERE BL.BL_KEYNO = BD.BD_BL_KEYNO AND BD.BD_BN_KEYNO = #{BD_BN_KEYNO} ORDER BY BL.BL_COLUMN_LEVEL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO b_board_column_data( BD_BT_KEYNO, BD_BN_KEYNO, BD_BL_KEYNO, BD_BL_TYPE, BD_MN_KEYNO, BD_DATA ) VALUES( #{BD_BT_KEYNO}, #{BD_BN_KEYNO}, #{BD_BL_KEYNO}, #{BD_BL_TYPE}, #{BD_MN_KEYNO}, #{BD_DATA} )
mapper.select: SELECT BD.*,BL.BL_LISTVIEW_YN FROM b_board_column_data BD LEFT JOIN b_board_column BL ON BD.BD_BL_KEYNO = BL.BL_KEYNO WHERE BD.BD_MN_KEYNO = #{BD_MN_KEYNO} AND BL.BL_LISTVIEW_YN = 'Y' AND BL.BL_USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY BD_BN_KEYNO, BL.BL_COLUMN_LEVEL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO b_board_column_data_history ( BDH_BD_KEYNO, BDH_BD_BT_KEYNO, BDH_BD_BN_KEYNO, BDH_BD_BL_KEYNO, BDH_BD_BL_TYPE, BDH_BD_MN_KEYNO, BDH_BD_DATA, BDH_BNH_KEYNO ) SELECT BD_KEYNO, BD_BT_KEYNO, BD_BN_KEYNO, BD_BL_KEYNO, BD_BL_TYPE, BD_MN_KEYNO, BD_DATA, #{BDH_BNH_KEYNO} FROM b_board_column_data WHERE BD_BN_KEYNO = #{BD_BN_KEYNO}
mapper.update: UPDATE b_board_column_data A, B_BOARD_COLUMN_DATA_HISTORY B SET A.BD_KEYNO = B.BDH_BD_KEYNO, A.BD_BT_KEYNO = B.BDH_BD_BT_KEYNO, A.BD_BN_KEYNO = B.BDH_BD_BN_KEYNO, A.BD_BL_KEYNO = B.BDH_BD_BL_KEYNO, A.BD_MN_KEYNO = B.BDH_BD_MN_KEYNO, A.BD_BL_TYPE = B.BDH_BD_BL_TYPE, A.BD_DATA = B.BDH_BD_DATA WHERE A.BD_KEYNO = B.BDH_BD_KEYNO AND B.BDH_BNH_KEYNO = #{BDH_BNH_KEYNO};
